items.comment: Todo: Maybe this whole sequence is really not cute at all because this is how all private guards are in the USA anyway, so it's just, like, documenting reality.
items.text:
Had I known that starting a moving company
would lead me into the East,

surrounded by foul creatures,
nary a book brought with me,

I'd have started some company
about being sedentary, instead.

Like ... Guards. But, guards
that never have any trouble.

Casual guards,
for buildings where nobody goes,

small, no walking,
we just sit there.

Warming our feet
by the fire.
